summary: Live PR inventory shard; no shared canonical was invented. The five seed PRs are open, non-security, contributor-authored work that should remain open. Four are focused/high-signal fixes with supplied proof and green relevant checks, so the unresolved decision is maintainer technical review, not cleanup closure. The draft docs PR is not eligible for low-signal closure because that policy is disabled. Hydrated security-sensitive linked PR #85472 is routed only to central security handling.
